media_supplements.name: fetal bovine serum (FBS)
media_supplements.note: Used in standard (non-xeno-free) 3D-RDM; replaced by KSR in xeno-free arm

media_supplements.name: rhlaminin 521
media_supplements.note: Coating substrate for iPSC maintenance plates

timeline.description: iPSCs cultured on rhlaminin 521-coated plates in E8 medium
iPSCs lifted with ReLeSR on day 0 into ultra-low adhesion dishes; E8-to-NIM transition over days 0–3; BMP4 added day 6; EBs adhered to CELLstart on day 7; BMP4 gradually withdrawn over days 6–14
Media switched to RDM on day 16
Outgrowths mechanically lifted to ultra-low attachment flasks in 3D-RDM (with retinoic acid)
Media switched to 3D-RDM minus (no retinoic acid)

key_substitutions: CELLstart replaces Matrigel as EB-attachment substrate
rhlaminin 521 used for iPSC maintenance coating

evidence.organoid_type: We report an optimized, xeno-free, GMP-compatible protocol for the generation of retinal organoids from human induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs)
evidence.source_cells.cell_type: retinal organoids from human induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs)
evidence.matrix.name: On day 7, EBs were adhered to Matrigel™ (Corning; Cat#354234 – standard protocol) or the following xeno-free substrates: CELLstart™ ... After initial testing of all substrates (Fig. 1), further experiments were done with CELLstart
evidence.matrix.xeno_free_rationale: CELLstart™ was selected as it is a fully-defined xeno-free product, has lot-to-consistency and produced under cGMP
evidence.base_media.NIM: Neural Induction Medium (NIM- DMEM/F12 (1:1) (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#11320033), 1% N2 supplement (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#17502048), 1% non-essential amino acids (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#11140050), 1% Glutamax (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#35050061), 2 µg/mL heparin (MilliporeSigma; Cat#H3149) and 0.2% Primocin (InvivoGen; Cat#ant-pm-2))
evidence.base_media.RDM: RDM - DMEM/F12 (3:1), 2% B27 supplement (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#17504044), 1% non-essential amino acids, 1% Glutamax and 0.2% Primocin
evidence.base_media.3D-RDM: RDM plus 10% FBS (as per our standard protocol) or 10% KnockOut™ Serum Replacement (KSR; Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#10828028), 100 µM taurine (MilliporeSigma; Cat#T0625), 1:1000 chemically defined lipid concentrate (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#11905031), and 1 µM all-trans retinoic acid (MilliporeSigma; Cat#R2625)
evidence.timeline.EB_day_start: To generate embryoid bodies (EBs), iPSCs were lifted using ReLeSR™ (STEMCELL Technologies; Cat#05872)
evidence.timeline.BMP4_day: On day 6, NIM was supplemented with 1.5 nM rhBMP4 (R&D Systems; Cat#314-BP-05/CF)
evidence.timeline.EB_adhesion: On day 7, EBs were adhered to Matrigel™ (Corning; Cat#354234 – standard protocol) or the following xeno-free substrates: CELLstart™
evidence.timeline.BMP4_withdrawal: BMP4 was gradually transitioned out of the NIM over seven days
evidence.timeline.BMP4_withdrawal_schedule: 100% on Day 6, 50% on day 9, 25% on day 12, 12.5% on day 14
evidence.timeline.3D_lift: Day 30: Outgrowth mechanically lifted to ultra-low attachment flasks in 3D-RDM
evidence.timeline.3D_RDM_minus: Day 100: Media switched to 3D-RDM minus (no retinoic acid)
evidence.iPSC_coating: iPSCs were cultured on recombinant human rhlaminin 521 coated cell culture plates in E8 medium (rhlaminin 521 (5 µg/mL; Biolamina; Cat#LN521-02))
evidence.passaging_reagent: iPSCs were lifted using ReLeSR™ (STEMCELL Technologies; Cat#05872)
evidence.rhBMP4_concentration: NIM was supplemented with 1.5 nM rhBMP4 (R&D Systems; Cat#314-BP-05/CF)
evidence.B27_supplement: RDM - DMEM/F12 (3:1), 2% B27 supplement (Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#17504044)
evidence.KSR: 10% KnockOut™ Serum Replacement (KSR; Thermo Fisher Scientific; Cat#10828028)
evidence.assay_endpoints.OTX2: the outer nuclear layer of all retinal organoids contained OTX2 and recoverin positive photoreceptor cells that extended outer segment-like structures
evidence.assay_endpoints.recoverin: OTX2 and recoverin positive photoreceptor cells

flags: correction:matrix_was_Matrigel_now_CELLstart — silver extracted Matrigel but Matrigel is the standard-protocol comparator; CELLstart is the selected xeno-free substrate used in further experiments
correction:timeline_EB_day_start_was_6_now_0 — EBs initiated day 0 (ReLeSR lift); day 6 is BMP4 addition; day 7 is EB adhesion; silver had day_start=6 and day_end=6
recall_miss:B27_2pct — 2% B27 supplement (Cat#17504044) in RDM not extracted by silver
recall_miss:KSR_10pct — 10% KnockOut Serum Replacement in xeno-free 3D-RDM not extracted by silver
recall_miss:CELLstart_matrix — same as matrix correction; also a recall miss in the supplement/matrix list
recall_miss:rhlaminin521_iPSC_coating — 5 µg/mL rhlaminin 521 (Biolamina Cat#LN521-02) for iPSC culture not extracted
recall_miss:DMEM_F12_NIM_RDM_ratios — NIM uses DMEM/F12 (1:1), RDM uses DMEM/F12 (3:1); ratios not captured by silver

recall_miss:supplement_concentrations_all_null — FBS 10%, Primocin 0.2%, N2 1%, NEAA 1%, Glutamax 1%, heparin 2 µg/mL, taurine 100 µM, lipid concentrate 1:1000, all-trans retinoic acid 1 µM all stated in text but not extracted
recall_miss:BMP4_gradual_withdrawal — BMP4 withdrawn stepwise over 7 days (100% d6→50% d9→25% d12→12.5% d14) not captured
notes: Xeno-free GMP-compatible iPSC-derived retinal organoid protocol. Key methodological innovation is substitution of Matrigel (animal-derived, batch-variable) with CELLstart (defined, cGMP, xeno-free) for EB attachment, and substitution of FBS with KSR in 3D-RDM. The silver extractor incorrectly assigned Matrigel as the matrix — the paper explicitly tests multiple substrates and selects CELLstart for all further experiments. EB timeline correction: day 0 = iPSC lift with ReLeSR (EB initiation); day 6 = BMP4 addition; day 7 = EB adhesion to substrate; silver had day_start=day_end=6 which conflates BMP4 addition with EB generation start. BMP4 withdrawal is stepwise over days 6–14, not a single removal event. RDM uses a 3:1 DMEM/F12 ratio (different from NIM's 1:1). The paper demonstrates equivalency across substrates (Matrigel, rhLaminin-111 ± nidogen-1/collagen IV, CELLstart) by phase microscopy and IHC; no statistical difference in OTX2/recoverin/ARR3 expression across groups. iPSC maintenance uses E8 medium on rhlaminin 521-coated plates — part of the xeno-free upstream workflow. silver_precision=89% (16/18 correct); recall misses total 7 documented items including the matrix identity error.
